data.result: Passed after moving foundation integration coverage into a workspace member crate so virtual workspace testing includes it.

data.naming: Binary fixture tests use checked-in ELF bytes and manifest sha256/expected metadata.
data.imports: revdeck-index owns native ELF parsing; revdeck-db owns idempotent indexed fact persistence.
data.formatting: Do not compile fixtures during tests; source-controlled binaries keep object counts and addresses deterministic.

data.name: Parser-resolver-executor command pipeline
data.description: Parser creates an AST only, resolver maps targets to ObjectRef and reports ambiguity/broken refs, executor mutates CommandState only after successful resolution.

data.name: Function Radar scoring analyzer
data.description: Run Function Radar as a separate analysis_run after ELF indexing; persist structured ScoreReason rows with JSON ObjectRef evidence_refs so every non-zero visible score can navigate to evidence.
